name: Literacy
shortDescription: Read and write a script used by the character’s culture.
contextNotes: Gateway skill for learned and administrative roles.

name: Language
shortDescription: Speak and understand a language.
contextNotes: Spoken language is universal; written use depends on Literacy.

name: Specific Language
shortDescription: Mastery of one specific language.
contextNotes: Best for scholars, diplomats, merchants, and elite specialists.

name: History
shortDescription: Know remembered past events, lineages, places, and major developments.
contextNotes: Exists orally and textually; becomes broader in literate societies.

name: Theology
shortDescription: Know religious belief, doctrine, rites, and sacred tradition.
contextNotes: More formal in organized sacred cultures.

name: Philosophy
shortDescription: Use structured reasoning about ethics, logic, metaphysics, and knowledge.

name: Law
shortDescription: Know legal rules, disputes, property, obligations, and judgment.
contextNotes: Broad legal-cultural skill; could later split customary vs codified law.

name: Bureaucratic Writing
shortDescription: Write formal records, reports, decrees, petitions, and official correspondence.
contextNotes: Narrower than full literate culture; ideal half-cost support skill.

name: Rhetorical Composition
shortDescription: Compose persuasive, formal, or elegant argument.

name: Measurement
shortDescription: Apply length, area, weight, volume, and proportion in practical use.

name: Mathematics
shortDescription: Use number, proportion, calculation, and quantitative reasoning.

name: Astronomy
shortDescription: Understand celestial movement for calendar, orientation, or study.

name: Alchemy
shortDescription: Work with substances, transformations, mixtures, and proto-chemical theory.

name: Natural Philosophy
shortDescription: Reason about nature, matter, and the physical world.
contextNotes: Better as an elite support skill than a base profession skill.

name: Surveying
shortDescription: Measure land, boundaries, gradients, and layout in the field.
contextNotes: Practical land-measurement and site-layout skill for builders, engineers, roads, estates, and fortifications.

name: Mechanics
shortDescription: Understand simple machines, force transfer, moving parts, and practical mechanisms.
contextNotes: Applied technical skill for devices, structural motion, simple machines, and engineering problem-solving.

name: Bargaining
shortDescription: Negotiate prices, terms, favors, and exchanges.

name: Gambling
shortDescription: Understand games of chance, betting behavior, and risk-taking.

name: Trading
shortDescription: Manage regular exchange of goods across households, markets, or routes.

name: Banking
shortDescription: Handle credit, deposits, transfers, loans, and financial instruments.

name: Administration
shortDescription: Run offices, records, logistics, and institutional routine.
contextNotes: Core official, steward, and governance skill.

name: Intrigue
shortDescription: Work within covert politics, factions, patronage, and hidden agendas.

name: Bookkeeping
shortDescription: Keep structured records of quantities, payments, inventories, and obligations.

name: Appraisal
shortDescription: Estimate quality, authenticity, condition, and value of goods.
contextNotes: Valuable merchant and rogue support skill.

name: Etiquette
shortDescription: Know expected manners, forms of respect, and socially correct behavior.

name: Etiquette by Culture
shortDescription: Apply etiquette within one specific culture or court tradition.

name: Heraldry
shortDescription: Recognize arms, badges, lineages, and formal symbols of status.
contextNotes: Distinct noble and military identity skill.

name: Courtly Protocol
shortDescription: Manage precedence, audiences, titles, and ceremonial court behavior.
contextNotes: Narrow but strong elite support skill.

name: Insight
shortDescription: Read mood, intention, sincerity, fear, uncertainty, or emotional state.

name: Social Perception
shortDescription: Notice status cues, alliances, tension, and interpersonal dynamics in groups.

name: Detect Lies
shortDescription: Judge whether speech or behavior suggests deception or concealment.

name: Seduction
shortDescription: Influence attraction or intimacy through timing, attention, and emotional reading.
contextNotes: Attractive but niche social support skill.

name: Singing
shortDescription: Use the voice for song, pitch, rhythm, and expression.

name: Dancing
shortDescription: Perform structured or improvised movement for ritual, celebration, or display.

name: Storytelling
shortDescription: Hold attention through spoken narrative, pacing, memory, and dramatic delivery.

name: Music
shortDescription: Play or perform structured instrumental music.

name: Acting
shortDescription: Adopt role, gesture, emotion, and presentation for staged or social performance.
contextNotes: Strong performer and infiltrator support skill.

name: Recitation
shortDescription: Deliver memorized text, verse, doctrine, or formal speech with control.

name: Oratory
shortDescription: Deliver persuasive public speech to assemblies, courts, or elites.
notes: Themistogenes Skills sheet: Social skill; source stats Int / Cha.

name: Concentration
shortDescription: Sustain attention and mental focus under distraction or pressure.

name: Memory
shortDescription: Retain, recall, and organize learned details or patterns.

name: Self-Control
shortDescription: Govern impulse, fear, pain response, and emotional reaction under pressure.
contextNotes: Broad mental and emotional control core.

name: Meditation
shortDescription: Use disciplined stillness, breath, or contemplation to regulate inner state.

name: Perception
shortDescription: Notice relevant details, threats, movement, and hidden information.
contextNotes: Core observation skill in and out of combat.
notes: Themistogenes Skills sheet: Action skill; source stats Int / Pow; note: 'no more luck'.

name: Animal care
shortDescription: Feed, calm, house, and maintain animals in routine condition.

name: Animal Training
shortDescription: Train animals to obey commands or perform useful tasks.

name: Herding
shortDescription: Manage grazing animals and control flock or herd behavior.

name: Riding
shortDescription: Ride and control a trained mount in travel, stress, or basic action.

name: Teamstering
shortDescription: Handle draft animals and direct wagons, carts, teams, or pack trains.

name: Falconry
shortDescription: Keep, train, and work birds of prey for hunting, display, or status use.

name: Sailing
shortDescription: Handle sails and work aboard a vessel under routine maritime conditions.

name: Navigation
shortDescription: Determine route, direction, and position at sea or on major waters.

name: Navigation by Environment
shortDescription: Navigate one environment such as open sea, coasts, rivers, lakes, or ice waters.

name: Ropework
shortDescription: Tie, maintain, and use lines, knots, and rigging.

name: Boat Handling
shortDescription: Maneuver small craft or directly control a vessel in tight or rough conditions.

name: Climb
shortDescription: Climb natural or built surfaces safely and efficiently.

name: Run
shortDescription: Sprint, pace, pursue, and move rapidly on foot.

name: Jump
shortDescription: Leap gaps, obstacles, and vertical distances with control.

name: Swim
shortDescription: Move safely and effectively through water.
contextNotes: Broad physical survival and adventure core.

name: Balance
shortDescription: Keep footing on narrow, unstable, moving, or slippery surfaces.

name: Acrobatics
shortDescription: Tumble, roll, control falls, and use advanced body control.
contextNotes: Stylish secondary; should stay narrower than core athletics.

name: Search
shortDescription: Search persons, containers, rooms, or sites for hidden items or traces.
contextNotes: Broad enough to support several roles.

name: Conceal Object
shortDescription: Hide small items on the body, in baggage, or in surroundings.

name: Trap Handling
shortDescription: Detect, avoid, disarm, or set traps and trigger mechanisms.

name: Pick lock
shortDescription: Open locks without the proper key using tools and tactile knowledge.

name: Pickpocket
shortDescription: Steal small items from a person without immediate detection.

name: Stealth
shortDescription: Move quietly, stay unnoticed, and avoid attention while approaching or withdrawing.

name: Hide
shortDescription: Use cover, terrain, darkness, or clutter to remain unseen.

name: Camouflage
shortDescription: Blend clothing, gear, and body into terrain or surroundings.

name: Disguise
shortDescription: Alter appearance, manner, and presentation to pass as another type of person.

name: Pottery
shortDescription: Shape, fire, and finish clay vessels and ceramic goods.

name: Weaving
shortDescription: Produce woven cloth, bands, and simple textiles.

name: Leatherworking
shortDescription: Cut, cure, shape, and repair leather goods and hide equipment.

name: Carpentry
shortDescription: Make and repair wooden structures, fittings, tools, and objects.

name: Tailoring
shortDescription: Cut, fit, alter, and finish garments.

name: Baking
shortDescription: Prepare and bake bread and staple oven foods reliably.

name: Brewing
shortDescription: Produce fermented drink from grain, fruit, honey, or similar materials.

name: Stoneworking
shortDescription: Cut, dress, shape, and fit stone for tools, structures, and finishes.

name: Smithing
shortDescription: Forge, shape, and repair metal tools, fittings, and simple equipment.

name: Blacksmith
shortDescription: Forge and repair general metal tools and common metalwork.

name: Armorer
shortDescription: Make and repair armor and defensive equipment.

name: Weapon Smith
shortDescription: Make and repair melee weapons and related combat metalwork.

name: Weapon Maintenance
shortDescription: Maintain, repair, and keep weapons serviceable in field or garrison use.
contextNotes: Support skill, not front-line combat skill.

name: Medicine
shortDescription: Diagnose and treat disease, injury, and bodily disorders using organized medical practice.
contextNotes: Core physician and healer profession skill.

name: First aid
shortDescription: Give immediate practical treatment to stabilize wounds, bleeding, shock, and urgent injury.

name: Herb lore
shortDescription: Know medicinal, harmful, and useful plants and their common uses.
contextNotes: Strong low-tech or hybrid healing core.

name: Poison Lore
shortDescription: Know poisons, toxins, symptoms, preparation, and antidotal principles.
contextNotes: Broad enough to define roles on its own.

name: Pharmacy
shortDescription: Prepare, compound, preserve, and dispense remedies and medical substances.

name: Nursing
shortDescription: Give ongoing care, monitoring, hygiene, and recovery support.

name: Surgery
shortDescription: Treat wounds and bodily problems through invasive intervention.

name: Bone Setting
shortDescription: Set fractures, dislocations, and structural injuries.

name: Obstetrics
shortDescription: Manage pregnancy, childbirth, and maternal care.

name: Poison Treatment
shortDescription: Diagnose and treat poisoning, envenomation, and toxic injury.

name: Battlefield Surgery
shortDescription: Perform urgent surgical treatment under combat or camp conditions.
contextNotes: Common-professional or elite depending later tuning.

name: Heart Surgery
shortDescription: Perform highly advanced thoracic or cardiac surgery.

name: Divination
shortDescription: Interpret signs, omens, visions, or ritual indicators for hidden meaning.

name: Omen Reading
shortDescription: Read natural signs, chance events, or behavior as meaningful omens.

name: Ritual Interpretation
shortDescription: Interpret ritual forms, sacred procedures, and prescribed signs.

name: Astrology
shortDescription: Use heavenly bodies and sign systems to interpret destiny, timing, or influence.

name: Augury
shortDescription: Interpret omens through a formalized sanctioned method.

name: Dodge
shortDescription: Avoid attacks through movement, timing, and body positioning.
contextNotes: Core defense; part of real melee training.
notes: Themistogenes Skills sheet: Combat skill; source stats Dex / Dex.

name: Parry
shortDescription: Defend with weapon or shield by turning aside or controlling an attack.
contextNotes: Core defense; includes shield use in base model.
notes: Themistogenes Skills sheet: Combat skill; source stats Dex / Dex.

name: Brawling
shortDescription: Fight effectively with punches, kicks, grapples, and rough unarmed violence.
notes: Themistogenes Skills sheet: Combat skill; source stats Str / Dex; note: 'Use either stat'.

name: 1-h edged
shortDescription: Fight with one-handed bladed weapons.
notes: Themistogenes Skills sheet: Combat skill; source stats Str / Dex; note: 'Use either stat'.

name: 1-h conc./axe
shortDescription: Fight with one-handed crushing or chopping weapons such as maces and axes.
notes: Themistogenes Skills sheet: Combat skill; source stats Str / Dex; note: 'Use either stat'.

name: 2-h edged
shortDescription: Fight with large two-handed bladed weapons using strength, reach, and committed technique.
contextNotes: Heavy cutting or slashing weapon family. Split from the former broad 2-handed Weapons row to align better with the source combat structure.
notes: Themistogenes Skills sheet: Combat skill; source stats Str / Dex; note: 'Use either stat'.

name: Polearms
shortDescription: Fight with spears and longer pole weapons used at reach.
notes: Themistogenes Skills sheet: Combat skill; source stats Str / Dex; note: 'Use either stat'.

name: 2-h conc./axe
shortDescription: Fight with large two-handed crushing or chopping weapons such as great axes, hammers, or mauls.
contextNotes: Heavy impact/chopping weapon family. Split from the former broad 2-handed Weapons row to align better with the source combat structure.
notes: Themistogenes Skills sheet: Combat skill; source stats Str / Dex; note: 'Use either stat'.

name: Lance
shortDescription: Fight with lance-type weapons, especially in mounted or reach-based military use.
notes: Themistogenes Skills sheet: Combat skill; source stats Str / Dex; note: 'Use either stat'.

name: Throwing
shortDescription: Attack accurately with thrown weapons such as javelins, knives, or axes.
notes: Themistogenes Skills sheet: Combat skill; source stats Dex / Dex.

name: Sling
shortDescription: Use sling-based missile weapons effectively in combat or hunting.
notes: Themistogenes Skills sheet: Combat skill; source stats Dex / Dex.

name: Bow
shortDescription: Use ordinary bows effectively in combat or hunting.
notes: Themistogenes Skills sheet: Combat skill; source stats Dex / Dex.

name: Longbow
shortDescription: Use powerful longbows requiring strength, discipline, and trained missile technique.
contextNotes: More specialized than ordinary bow use.
notes: Themistogenes Skills sheet: Combat skill; source stats Dex / Dex.

name: Crossbow
shortDescription: Use mechanically spanned missile weapons effectively in combat.
notes: Themistogenes Skills sheet: Combat skill; source stats Dex / Dex.

name: Combat Experience
shortDescription: Stay functional and rational under lethal danger and battlefield shock.
contextNotes: Veteran-facing secondary; not baseline novice training.

name: Battlefield Awareness
shortDescription: Read immediate battlefield danger, openings, movement, and changing threats under pressure.

name: Formation Fighting
shortDescription: Hold place and fight coherently within a rank, line, shield wall, or drilled group.

name: Mounted Combat
shortDescription: Fight effectively while mounted and control attack timing, position, and weapon use in motion.

name: Tactics
shortDescription: Understand battlefield positioning, timing, coordination, and practical combat plans.
contextNotes: Officer and planner skill distinct from direct troop-control.

name: Captaincy
shortDescription: Lead fighters, maintain order, and get people to act coherently under pressure.
contextNotes: Practical troop-control and morale skill; distinct from Tactics.
notes: Themistogenes Skills sheet: Social skill; source stats Pow / Pow.

name: Fencing
shortDescription: Fight with fast refined civilian or dueling blades such as rapier and related weapons.
notes: Themistogenes Skills sheet: Combat skill; source stats Str / Dex; note: 'Use either stat'.

name: Sword & Buckler / Main-Gauche Style
shortDescription: Fight using a main blade with an active off-hand defensive or companion weapon.

name: Gladiatorial Style
shortDescription: Fight within a specialized weapon-and-style tradition designed for formal duel or arena contexts.
contextNotes: Placeholder family for later gladiatorial branches.
notes: Parent attack skill depends on branch.

name: Regional Martial Style
shortDescription: Apply a named regional or school-based martial tradition using an existing weapon family or unarmed parent.
contextNotes: Placeholder family for later Japanese, Chinese, ninja, samurai, and similar traditions.
notes: Parent skill varies by branch.
